improvement: Harden GitHub artifact-attestation normalization from workflow substring matching to exact repository, workflow ref, certificate identity, transparency-log, and SHA-256 subject requirements.

verification.route: Node built-in test runner using byte-identical committed module and equivalent committed test cases

limits: No Cloudflare deployment occurred because required external credentials remain unavailable.
The normalizer relies on gh attestation verify output and does not independently perform public-key or certificate-chain verification.
Cryptographic provenance does not establish scientific truth or successful deployment by itself.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, health material, or personal identifying information are included.
falsification_route: Provide a gh verification row with an untrusted repository, signer suffix, different certificate identity, absent transparency-log verification, or malformed digest and observe that normalization returns not_verified.
